scripts.start: npm --silent run kill:3000 && npm --prefix IERG4210 --silent run server
scripts.start:dev: npm --silent run kill:3000 && npm --prefix IERG4210 --silent run start:dev
scripts.kill:3000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $port=3000; $conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen; if(-not $conns){exit 0}; $ids=$conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach($id in $ids){ Stop-Process -Id $id -Force }"
